TagsProperties.description: An array of tags that assigns related properties such as `'keywords' => [ 'Has keywords', ... ]`.

TagsStrings.description: Describes static content for an assigned `<meta>` tag such as `'some:tag' => 'Content that is static'`.

TagsBlacklist.description: Listed tags are generally assumed to be reserved or excluded for free use.

TagsPropertyFallbackUsage.description: In case it is set `true` then the first property that returns a valid content for an assigned tag will be used exclusively.
